title: Ensure RAM password policy requires at least one lowercase letter

input_row.title: Ensure RAM password policy requires at least one lowercase letter
input_row.description: RAM password policies can be used to ensure password complexity. It is recommended that the password policy require at least one lowercase letter.
input_row.rationale: Enhancing complexity of a password policy increases account resiliency against brute force logon attempts.
input_row.audit: Perform the following to ensure the password policy is configured as expected: Through the management console: 1. Logon to RAM console. 2. Choose Identities > Settings. 3. In the Password Strength Settings section, make sure that the value of Required Elements in Password contains Lowercase Letters. Through the CLI: aliyun ram GetPasswordPolicy In the output, make sure that the RequireLowercaseCharacters parameter is set to true.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following to set the password policy: Through the management console: 1. Logon to RAM console. 2. Choose Identities > Settings. 3. In the Password Strength Settings section, click Edit Password Rule. 4. In the Required Elements in Password section, select Lowercase Letter. 5. Click OK. 30 | P a g e Through the CLI: aliyun ram SetPasswordPolicy --RequireLowercaseCharacters true
input_row.default_value: The default password policy does not enforce any element in a password.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:** 
The audit can be fully checked using the Aliyun CLI command provided in the audit section, which verifies the requirement for at least one lowercase letter in the RAM password policy. Therefore, it is API-checkable, aligning with the criteria for an automated audit approach.

**PROGRAM NAME:** 
ali_ram_password_policy_lowercase_character_required

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
The automated program will perform the following checks:
- Use the Aliyun CLI command `aliyun ram GetPasswordPolicy` to retrieve the current password policy settings.
- Specifically, check the `RequireLowercaseCharacters` parameter in the output.
- Validation Criteria:
  - **Pass:** If `RequireLowercaseCharacters` is set to true.
  - **Fail:** If `RequireLowercaseCharacters` is set to false or the parameter is absent.

By executing this command, the program will determine whether the password policy enforces the presence of at least one lowercase letter as required by security standards.
